task_completion.description: Verify that ActivInspire is open and the file is saved with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ActivInspire application window. The title bar or tab should display 'independence_gazette.flipchart'.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of the required headers, dateline, and byline on Page 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text boxes on the first page containing 'The Independence Gazette', 'Philadelphia, July 5, 1776', 'Independence Declared!', 'By Benjamin Harris', and 'King George Responds'.

task_completion.description: Verify the article body on Page 1 contains the required historical terms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a paragraph of text (at least two sentences) on the first page that explicitly mentions 'Continental Congress' and 'Declaration of Independence'.

task_completion.description: Verify the layout on Page 1 includes at least two vertical column dividers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for at least two vertical lines or thin vertical rectangles placed on Page 1 to separate the text into columns.

task_completion.description: Verify the existence of Page 2 with the required title and instructions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the page browser or the main canvas for a second page. It must contain the title 'Your Assignment' and a list of instructions for students.

task_completion.description: Verify the visual requirement on Page 2 (rectangular border/highlight).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a rectangular shape on Page 2 that acts as a border or a highlight box surrounding the instruction text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the ActivInspire interface being actively used (e.g., text tool, shape tool selected), rather than just a terminal window.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that terminal windows do not show python scripts or echo commands directly writing the .flipchart file or its contents.

integrity.description: Verify the text and shapes are placed on the actual flipchart canvas.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required text and shapes should be visible on the white canvas area of ActivInspire, not inside a separate text editor or web browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 2-page ActivInspire flipchart saved as 'independence_gazette.flipchart' in /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/. Page 1 must have specific text ('The Independence Gazette', 'Philadelphia, July 5, 1776', 'Independence Declared!', 'By Benjamin Harris', 'King George Responds') and body text mentioning 'Continental Congress' and 'Declaration of Independence'. Page 1 must also have at least 2 vertical column dividers (lines/rectangles). Page 2 must have the title 'Your Assignment', instruction text, and a rectangular border/highlight box around the instructions. Total minimum shapes required is 3.
